allowed_errors.meaning: The requested sample/entity id is not present in sandbox state.
The assay result payload does not match the expected result schema fields.
The assay result write does not cite required dry-run or instrument evidence.

dry_run_semantics: Sample, entity, assay request, and result records are sandbox records only.
Result creation tools write to sandbox state and never call a live Benchling tenant.
Result payloads must preserve entity id, project id, schema id, and evidence provenance required by the task verifier.

live_boundary.boundary_statement: This source pack forbids production Benchling writes, live tenant mutation, and credentialed API calls.

role: ELN/LIMS assay request, sample/entity metadata, and assay result handoff.
source_gaps: Step 1 does not yet capture a full OpenAPI endpoint document for the selected Benchling endpoints.
Only the assay-result creation shape is represented; worklist/request fixtures remain to be source-grounded.

tools.dry_run_behavior: Reads an assay request from sandbox state.
tools.operation: Get assay request or worklist metadata.

tools.dry_run_behavior: Reads sample/entity metadata from sandbox state.
tools.operation: Get sample or entity metadata used by an assay result.

tools.dry_run_behavior: Creates an assay-result draft in sandbox state and requires verifier-visible provenance.
